commands.review_summary:
The PR carries pre-update source config into post-core update repair, restores dropped channel entries, persists restored config when plugin work is otherwise unchanged, and adds regression coverage plus a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: yes. for source-level reproduction: current main's post-core update process reads the post-doctor config and has no pre-update channel config handoff, while the linked report gives concrete upgrade steps. I did not execute the test or a live upgrade because this review was read-only.
